summary: On April 3-4, 2026, Russian operators from the "Rubicon" Center conducted strikes in Donbas, the Sumy and Krasny Liman directions, destroying 144 Ukrainian targets including fixed-wing UAVs and UAV control points. In one incident, two Russian "Yolka" air defense drones simultaneously intercepted an enemy fixed-wing UAV with kinetic strikes. Ukrainian forces, including the 36th Marine Brigade near Kostiantynivka, survived Russian FPV drone attacks, reportedly using drone detectors to anticipate targeting. On April 2, Ukrainian operators from the 1st Separate Special Operations Center, in coordination with the Defense Intelligence of Ukraine, struck a UAV storage facility, an aircraft, and a radar station in temporarily occupied Crimea, including a site storing "Orion" UAVs valued at over $5 million each. Additionally, Ukrainian-controlled drones dropped printed money with QR codes in border regions as a psychological operation, and Ukrainian electronic warfare successfully interfered with Russian FPV drone operations.
